---
title: "HGG survival Analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-20"
#includes dubois data, supplemental table (although may not be most updated version) and updated HGG NOS from CBTN
#removed HGNET tumors
---
#Survival Graph - All HGG
#Load packages
```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(grid)
df <- read_excel("/Users/sunitasridhar/Desktop/Research_Project/GitHub/data/pHGG_Survival_Data_Merged.xlsx")
df <- df %>% rename_with(~ gsub("\\s+", "_", .x)) %>% rename_with(tolower) %>% filter(!is.na(os_months)) %>%
  mutate(os_status = tolower(os_status),os_event = case_when(os_status %in% c("deceased", "dead") ~ 1,os_status %in% c("alive", "living") ~ 0,TRUE ~ NA_real_),
    amplicon_class = case_when(
      amplicon_class %in% c("no amplification", "No amplifications", "no amplificatio") ~ "no amplifications",
      amplicon_class == "ecDNA" ~ "ecDNA",
      amplicon_class %in% c("Chromosomal", "intrachromosomal") ~ "intrachromosomal",
      TRUE ~ "other"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(os_event))

print(table(df$amplicon_class))
print(table(df$os_event))
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ amplicon_class, data = df)
logrank <- pairwise_survdiff(Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ amplicon_class, data = df, p.adjust.method = "BH")
logrank_df <- as.data.frame(as.table(as.matrix(logrank$p.value)))
p_ecDNA <- logrank_df %>% filter(Var1 == "ecDNA" | Var2 == "ecDNA") %>% mutate(comparison = paste(Var1, "vs", Var2), p_value = signif(Freq, 3)) %>%
  select(comparison, p_value)
print(p_ecDNA)
km_plot <- ggsurvplot(
  fit = km_fit,
  data = df,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  palette = c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#4DAF4A"),
  ggtheme = theme_bw() + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)),
  title = "pHGG Survival by Amplicon Class",
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Survival Probability",
  risk.table.height = 0.25,
  risk.table.y.text.col = TRUE,
  risk.table.y.text = FALSE,
  font.main = c(16, "bold", "black"),
  font.x = c(14, "bold", "black"),
  font.y = c(14, "bold", "black")
)
pval_labels <- paste0(p_ecDNA$comparison, " (p=", p_ecDNA$p_value, ")")
options(repr.plot.width = 12, repr.plot.height = 8)
print(km_plot)
pdf("KM_Survival_AmpliconClass.pdf", width = 12, height = 8)
dev.off()
cat(paste0(p_ecDNA$comparison, ": ", p_ecDNA$p_value, collapse = "\n"))
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
df <- read_excel("/Users/sunitasridhar/Desktop/Research_Project/GitHub/data/pHGG_Survival_Data_Merged.xlsx") %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub("\\s+", "_", .x)) %>%
  rename_with(tolower) %>%
  filter(!is.na(os_months)) %>%
  mutate(
    os_status = tolower(os_status),
    os_event = case_when(
      os_status %in% c("deceased", "dead") ~ 1,
      os_status %in% c("alive", "living") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    amplicon_class = ifelse(amplicon_class == "ecDNA", "ecDNA+", "ecDNA-")
  ) %>%
  mutate(amplicon_class = factor(amplicon_class, levels = c("ecDNA+", "ecDNA-"))) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(os_event))
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ amplicon_class, data = df)
logrank <- pairwise_survdiff(Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ amplicon_class, data = df, p.adjust.method = "BH")
logrank_df <- as.data.frame(as.table(as.matrix(logrank$p.value)))
p_ecDNA <- logrank_df %>%
  filter((Var1 == "ecDNA+" & Var2 == "ecDNA-") | (Var1 == "ecDNA-" & Var2 == "ecDNA+")) %>%
  mutate(
    comparison = paste(Var1, "vs", Var2),
    p_value = signif(Freq, 3)
  ) %>%
  select(comparison, p_value)
pval_num <- p_ecDNA$p_value  
summary_table <- tableGrob(
  p_ecDNA,
  rows = NULL,
  theme = ttheme_minimal(base_size = 12)
)
km_plot <- ggsurvplot(
  fit = km_fit,
  data = df,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  palette = c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8"),  # red, blue
  ggtheme = theme_bw() + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)),
  title = "pHGG Survival: ecDNA+ vs ecDNA-",
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Survival Probability",
  risk.table.height = 0.25,
  risk.table.y.text.col = TRUE,
  risk.table.y.text = FALSE,
  font.main = c(16, "bold", "black"),
  font.x = c(14, "bold", "black"),
  font.y = c(14, "bold", "black"),
  pval = TRUE,                
  pval.method = FALSE,        
  pval.coord = c(0, 0.03),    
  pval.size = 6
)
km_plot$plot <- km_plot$plot +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = max(df$os_months) * 0.75,
    y = 0.15,
    label = paste0("Log-rank p = ", pval_num),
    size = 5
  )
pdf("pHGG_Survival_ecDNA_vs_ecDNAminus.pdf", width = 12, height = 12)
print(km_plot$plot) 
print(km_plot$table)
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(summary_table) 
dev.off()
```
#Cox regression with subclasses
```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(ggplot2)
library(grid)
df <- read_excel("/Users/sunitasridhar/Desktop/Research_Project/GitHub/data/pHGG_Survival_Data_Merged.xlsx") %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub("\\s+", "_", .x)) %>%
  rename_with(tolower) %>%
  filter(!is.na(os_months)) %>%
  mutate(
    os_status = tolower(os_status),
    os_event = case_when(
      os_status %in% c("deceased", "dead") ~ 1,
      os_status %in% c("alive", "living") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    ecDNA_status = ifelse(amplicon_class == "ecDNA", "ecDNA+", "ecDNA-"),
    chromosomal_amp = ifelse(amplicon_class %in% c("Chromosomal", "intrachromosomal"), "amp+", "amp-")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(os_event))
subclass_counts <- df %>% count(cancer_subclass)
#rare_subclasses <- subclass_counts %>% filter(n < 5) %>% pull(cancer_subclass)
#df <- df %>% mutate(cancer_subclass2 = ifelse(cancer_subclass %in% rare_subclasses, "Other", cancer_subclass))
collapse_to_other <- c("IHG_ALK", "IHG_NRTK", "IHG_ROS1_TP53", "IHGNOS")
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    cancer_subclass2 = case_when(
      cancer_subclass %in% collapse_to_other ~ "Other",
      TRUE ~ cancer_subclass
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(cancer_subclass2 = factor(cancer_subclass2)) %>%
  droplevels()
df <- df %>%mutate(ecDNA_status = factor(ecDNA_status, levels = c("ecDNA-", "ecDNA+")),chromosomal_amp = factor(chromosomal_amp, levels = c("amp-", "amp+")),cancer_subclass2 = factor(cancer_subclass2)) %>% droplevels()  
for(f in c("ecDNA_status", "chromosomal_amp", "cancer_subclass2")){
  tab <- table(df[[f]])
  if(any(tab == 0)){
    df <- df %>% filter(.data[[f]] %in% names(tab[tab > 0]))
  }
}
#Combining similar HGG subclasses
h3k27_classes <- c("DMG_H3K27", "DMG_H3K27M", "HGG_H3K27", "DMG_H3K27_TP53")
h3wt_classes  <- c("HGG_H3WT", "HGG_H3WT_TP53")
h3g34_classes <- c("DHG_H3G34", "DHG_H3G34_TP53", "HGG_H3G34")

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    cancer_subclass_combined = case_when(
      cancer_subclass %in% h3k27_classes ~ "H3K27-altered",
      cancer_subclass %in% h3wt_classes  ~ "H3WT-altered",
      cancer_subclass %in% h3g34_classes  ~ "H3G34-altered",
      TRUE ~ cancer_subclass
    )
  )

subclass_counts2 <- df %>% count(cancer_subclass_combined)
rare2 <- subclass_counts2 %>% filter(n < 5) %>% pull(cancer_subclass_combined)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    cancer_subclass_combined = ifelse(
      cancer_subclass_combined %in% rare2,
      "Other",
      cancer_subclass_combined
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(cancer_subclass_combined = factor(cancer_subclass_combined)) %>%
  droplevels()

#Making HGG NOS and IHG NAs for purposes of cox regression
nos_classes <- c("HGG_NOS", "IHG_ALK", "IHG_NRTK", "IHG_ROS1_TP53", "IHGNOS")

#Creating separate columns for H3K27, H3G34, TP53 and IDH
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    H3G34 = case_when(
      cancer_subclass %in% nos_classes ~ NA_real_,
      grepl("H3G34", cancer_subclass, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    IDH = case_when(
      cancer_subclass %in% nos_classes ~ NA_real_,
      grepl("IDH", cancer_subclass, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    TP53 = case_when(
      cancer_subclass %in% nos_classes ~ NA_real_,
      grepl("TP53", cancer_subclass, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    H3K27 = case_when(
      cancer_subclass %in% nos_classes ~ NA_real_,
      grepl("H3K27", cancer_subclass, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    H3WT = case_when(
      cancer_subclass %in% nos_classes ~ NA_real_,
      grepl("H3WT", cancer_subclass, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    )
  )

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      c(H3G34, TP53, H3K27, H3WT, IDH),
      ~ factor(.x, levels = c(0, 1))
    )
  )
#Setting reference as HGG_H3WT
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    cancer_subclass_combined = factor(
      cancer_subclass_combined,
      levels = c(
        "H3WT-altered",      # ⭐ reference
        "H3K27-altered",
        "H3G34-altered",
        "Other"
      )
    )
  )
#confirming reference
levels(df$cancer_subclass_combined)

#creating survival curve for ecDNA status
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_status, data = df)
km_plot <- ggsurvplot(
  fit = km_fit,
  data = df,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  palette = c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8"),
  ggtheme = theme_bw() + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)),
  title = "pHGG Survival: ecDNA+ vs ecDNA-",
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Survival Probability",
  risk.table.height = 0.25
)

#creating survival curve for amplicon_class
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ amplicon_class, data = df)
km_plot <- ggsurvplot(
  fit = km_fit,
  data = df,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  palette = c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#D55E00"),
  ggtheme = theme_bw() + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)),
  title = "pHGG Survival: ecDNA+ vs ecDNA-",
  xlab = "Overall Survival (Months)",
  ylab = "Survival Probability",
  risk.table.height = 0.25
)

km_plot$plot <- km_plot$plot +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = max(df$os_months) * 0.75,
    y = 0.15,
    label = paste0("Log-rank p = ", pval_num),
    size = 5
  )
pdf("pHGG_Survival_byampliconclass.pdf", width = 12, height = 12)
print(km_plot$plot) 

#Cox model for cancer subclass combined
cox_model <- coxph(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_status + chromosomal_amp + cancer_subclass_combined,
  data = df
)
summary(cox_model)
pdf("pHGG_Survival_KM_and_Cox.pdf", width = 12, height = 8)
print(km_plot$plot)
print(km_plot$table)
tryCatch({
  ggforest(cox_model, data = df, main = "Cox Regression: pHGG Survival")
}, error = function(e){
  message("ggforest failed: ", e$message)
})

ggforest(cox_model, data = as.data.frame(df))

dev.off()
```
```{r}
#Question: Does ecDNA independently affect survival after mutations
cox_multi <- coxph(
 Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_status + chromosomal_amp + H3K27 + H3G34 + TP53,
 data = df
)
summary(cox_multi)

ggforest(cox_multi, data = as.data.frame(df))

dev.off()
```
```{r}
#Cox model for cancer subclass combined. Question: Does ecDNA;s effect depend on mutation status (is ecDNA worse in H3K27 tumors than in H3WT tumors)
cox_interaction <- coxph(
Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_status * H3K27 + chromosomal_amp + H3WT + H3G34 + TP53,
data = df
)
summary(cox_interaction)

df <- df %>% mutate(ecDNA_H3K27 = interaction(ecDNA_status, H3K27, drop = TRUE)) 

fit <- survfit(Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_H3K27, data = df)

ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = df,
  pval = TRUE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  legend.title = "ecDNA × H3 status",
  legend.labs = levels(df$ecDNA_H3K27)
)

ggforest(cox_interaction, data = as.data.frame(df))

#Cox model for H3K27 interaction with amplicon_class
cox_interaction <- coxph(
Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ amplicon_class * H3K27 + chromosomal_amp + H3G34 + TP53,
data = df
)
summary(cox_interaction)

df <- df %>% mutate(ecDNA_H3K27 = interaction(amplicon_class, H3K27, drop = TRUE)) 

fit <- survfit(Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_H3K27, data = df)

ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = df,
  pval = TRUE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  legend.title = "ecDNA × H3 status",
  legend.labs = levels(df$ecDNA_H3K27)
)

ggforest(cox_interaction, data = as.data.frame(df))

df_H3K27neg <- df %>% filter(H3K27 == 0)

fit_neg <- survfit(Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ amplicon_class,
                   data = df_H3K27neg)

p1 <- ggsurvplot(
  fit_neg,
  data = df_H3K27neg,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  pval = TRUE,
  conf.int = FALSE,
  legend.title = "ecDNA",
  legend.labs = c("ecDNA", "intrachromosomal", "no amplification"),
  title = "H3K27– tumors"
)

df_H3K27pos <- df %>% filter(H3K27 == 1)

fit_pos <- survfit(Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ amplicon_class,
                   data = df_H3K27pos)

p2 <- ggsurvplot(
  fit_pos,
  data = df_H3K27pos,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  pval = TRUE,
  conf.int = FALSE,
  legend.title = "ecDNA",
  legend.labs = c("ecDNA", "intrachromosomal", "no amplification"),
  title = "H3K27-altered tumors"
)

library(patchwork)

p1$plot + p2$plot

#save figure
ggsave("KM_ampliconclass_by_H3K27.pdf", width = 10, height = 5)

#KM within H3K27-negative tumors

df_H3K27neg <- df %>% filter(H3K27 == 0)

fit_neg <- survfit(Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_status,
                   data = df_H3K27neg)

p1 <- ggsurvplot(
  fit_neg,
  data = df_H3K27neg,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  pval = TRUE,
  conf.int = FALSE,
  legend.title = "ecDNA",
  legend.labs = c("ecDNA−", "ecDNA+"),
  title = "H3K27– tumors"
)

#KM within H3K27 positive tumors
df_H3K27pos <- df %>% filter(H3K27 == 1)

fit_pos <- survfit(Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_status,
                   data = df_H3K27pos)

p2 <- ggsurvplot(
  fit_pos,
  data = df_H3K27pos,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  pval = TRUE,
  conf.int = FALSE,
  legend.title = "ecDNA",
  legend.labs = c("ecDNA−", "ecDNA+"),
  title = "H3K27-altered tumors"
)
#combine into one figure
library(patchwork)

p1$plot + p2$plot

#save figure
ggsave("KM_ecDNA_by_H3K27.pdf", width = 10, height = 5)

#cancer subclass combined cox curve
cox_subclasscombinedinteraction <- coxph(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_status * cancer_subclass_combined + chromosomal_amp,
  data = df
)
summary(cox_subclasscombinedinteraction)

#concern for using individual variables due to overparameterization and introduces perfect/near-perfect collinearity.

coxph(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~
    ecDNA_status +
    cancer_subclass_combined +
    chromosomal_amp +
    TP53,
  data = df
)

#Answers: “Is ecDNA prognostic independent of histone subtype?”. Answer is no, globally across all subtypes

#create a clean H3K27 bin
df$H3K27_bin <- ifelse(df$cancer_subclass_combined == "H3K27-altered", 1, 0)

coxph(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~
    ecDNA_status * H3K27_bin +
    cancer_subclass_combined +
    chromosomal_amp +
    TP53,
  data = df
)

#interpretation: ecDNA is prognostic in gliomas lacking H3K27 alteration, but its effect is neutralized in the context of H3K27-altered disease, where baseline risk is already extreme.

#pairwise_survdiff(
  #Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_H3K27,
  #data = df,
  #p.adjust.method = "BH"
#)

dev.off()
```
#Making combined forest plot with the data
```{r}
#Fit model
cox_ecDNA_adj <- coxph(
Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_status + H3K27 + H3G34 + TP53,
  data = df
)
#tidy model output
library(broom)
forest_df <- tidy(cox_ecDNA_adj, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  mutate(
    term = recode(
      term,
      "ecDNA_status1" = "ecDNA+",
      "H3K271" = "H3K27-altered",
      "H3G341" = "H3G34-altered",
      "TP531"  = "TP53-altered"
    )
  )
#Forest plot
library(ggplot2)

p_forest <- ggplot(
  forest_df,
  aes(x = estimate, y = reorder(term, estimate))
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high),
    height = 0.25,
    linewidth = 1,
    orientation = "y"
  ) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(
    title = "Multivariable Cox Model for Overall Survival",
    subtitle = "Hazard ratios adjusted for mutation status",
    x = "Hazard Ratio (log scale)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 28) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 32),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 24)
  )

ggsave(
  "Forest_Cox_ecDNA_adjusted.png",
  p_forest,
  width = 13.33,
  height = 7.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```
#Fitting multiple models
```{r}
cox_unadj <- coxph(Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_status, data = df)

cox_adj <- coxph(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_status + H3K27 + H3G34 + TP53,
  data = df
)

cox_interaction <- coxph(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_status * H3K27 + H3G34 + TP53,
  data = df
)

#extract ecDNA effect from each model
extract_ecDNA <- function(model, label) {
  tidy(model, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
    filter(term == "ecDNA_status1") %>%
    mutate(model = label)
}

forest_multi <- bind_rows(
  extract_ecDNA(cox_unadj, "Unadjusted"),
  extract_ecDNA(cox_adj, "Adjusted for mutations"),
  extract_ecDNA(cox_interaction, "With H3K27 interaction")
)

#Forest plot
p_forest_multi <- ggplot(
  forest_multi,
  aes(x = estimate, y = model)
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high),
    height = 0.25,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(
    title = "Effect of ecDNA on Overall Survival Across Models",
    x = "Hazard Ratio (log scale)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 28) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 32),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 24)
  )

ggsave(
  "Forest_ecDNA_ModelComparison.png",
  p_forest_multi,
  width = 20.33,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300
)

forest_df
forest_multi
```
#Revision of survival curve with interaction terms so easier to interpret plots
```{r}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    H3_group = factor(
      ifelse(H3K27 == 1, "H3K27M", "WT"),
      levels = c("WT", "H3K27M")
    ),
    ecDNA_group = factor(
      ifelse(group2 == "ecDNA+", "ecDNA+", "ecDNA−"),
      levels = c("ecDNA−", "ecDNA+")
    )
  )

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    strata_group = interaction(H3_group, ecDNA_group, drop = TRUE)
  )

table(df$strata_group)


fit2 <- survfit(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ strata_group,
  data = df
)

fit2$strata

ggsurvplot(
  fit2,
  data = df,
  pval = TRUE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  legend.title = "H3 status × ecDNA",
  legend.labs = levels(df$strata_group),
  palette = c("#0072B2", "#0072B2", "#D55E00", "#D55E00"),
  linetype = c("solid", "dashed", "solid", "dashed")
)


ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = df,
  pval = TRUE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  legend = "right",
  legend.title = "Groups"
) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text",
    x = 60, y = 0.85, label = "WT, no ecDNA",
    color = "#0072B2", hjust = 0
  )

ggsurvplot(
  fit,
  data = df,
  pval = TRUE,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  legend.title = "H3 status × ecDNA",
  legend = "right",
  risk.table.height = 0.25,
  censor = TRUE
)

ggforest(
  cox_interaction,
  data = df,
  main = "Cox model with ecDNA × H3K27 interaction",
  cpositions = c(0.02, 0.22, 0.4),
  fontsize = 1.0
)

cox_stratified <- coxph(
  Surv(os_months, os_event) ~ ecDNA_status + TP53 + H3G34,
  data = df,
  subset = H3K27 == "K27M"
)

summary(cox_stratified)

table(df$ecDNA_status, useNA = "ifany")
table(df$H3K27, useNA = "ifany")
table(df$ecDNA_H3K27, useNA = "ifany")



```
#Venn diagram
```{r}
library(ggvenn)

group1 <- df$TP53
group2 <- df$ecDNA_status

g1 <- as.logical(group1 == 1)
g2 <- as.logical(group2 == "ecDNA+")

keep <- !is.na(g1) & !is.na(g2)

g1 <- g1[keep]
g2 <- g2[keep]

set1 <- which(g1)
set2 <- which(g2)

venn_list <- list(
  TP53_positive = set1,
  ecDNA_positive  = set2
)

ggvenn(
  venn_list,
  fill_color = c("#0072B2", "#D55E00"),
  fill_alpha = 0.5,
  set_name_size = 4
)

data.frame(
  TP53_only = sum(g1 & !g2),
  ecDNA_only  = sum(!g1 & g2),
  Both        = sum(g1 & g2),
  Neither     = sum(!g1 & !g2)
)

tab <- table(
  TP53 = g1,
  ecDNA  = g2
)

tab

fisher_res <- fisher.test(tab)
fisher_res


```
